positive_case.name: User successfully registers with valid credentials
positive_case.description:
Test Case: POSITIVE - Successful Registration
Steps:
1. Navigate to https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/register.htm
2. Fill registration form with valid data:
   - First Name: John
   - Last Name: Doe
   - Address: 123 Main Street
   - City: New York
   - State: NY
   - Zip Code: 10001
   - Phone: 2125551234
   - SSN: 123456789
   - Username: johndoe2026
   - Password: SecurePass@123
   - Confirm Password: SecurePass@123
3. Click Register button
Expected Result: Registration should be successful, user should be redirected to login or dashboard
positive_case.gherkin:
Feature: ParaBank User Registration
  Scenario: User successfully registers with valid credentials
    Given User navigates to ParaBank registration page
    When User enters valid personal information:
      | Field        | Value           |
      | First Name   | John            |
      | Last Name    | Doe             |
      | Address      | 123 Main St     |
      | City         | New York        |
      | State        | NY              |
      | Zip Code     | 10001           |
      | Phone        | 2125551234      |
      | SSN          | 123456789       |
      | Username     | johndoe2026     |
      | Password     | SecurePass@123  |
    And User confirms the password matching
    When User clicks Register button
    Then Registration should be successful
    And User should be redirected to login page or dashboard

negative_case_1.name: Registration fails with empty required fields
negative_case_1.description:
Test Case: NEGATIVE - Empty Required Field (First Name)
Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Leave First Name field empty
3. Fill other required fields:
   - Last Name: Doe
   - Address: 123 Main Street
   - City: New York
   - State: NY
   - Zip Code: 10001
   - Phone: 2125551234
   - SSN: 123456789
   - Username: testuser1
   - Password: SecurePass@123
   - Confirm Password: SecurePass@123
4. Click Register button
Expected Result: Registration should fail with error message about required field
negative_case_1.gherkin:
Feature: ParaBank Registration Validation
  Scenario: Registration fails with empty required fields
    Given User navigates to ParaBank registration page
    When User leaves First Name field empty
    And User fills other required fields
    And User clicks Register button
    Then Registration should fail
    And User should see error message for required First Name field
    And User should remain on registration page

negative_case_2.name: Registration fails with password mismatch
negative_case_2.description:
Test Case: NEGATIVE - Password Mismatch
Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Fill all fields with valid data:
   - First Name: Jane
   - Last Name: Smith
   - Address: 456 Oak Avenue
   - City: Los Angeles
   - State: CA
   - Zip Code: 90001
   - Phone: 2135551234
   - SSN: 987654321
   - Username: janesmith2026
   - Password: SecurePass@123
   - Confirm Password: DifferentPass@456  (MISMATCH)
3. Click Register button
Expected Result: Registration should fail with password mismatch error
negative_case_2.gherkin:
Feature: ParaBank Registration Validation
  Scenario: Registration fails with password mismatch
    Given User navigates to ParaBank registration page
    When User enters valid personal information
    And User enters Password as "SecurePass@123"
    And User enters Confirm password as "DifferentPass@456"
    When User clicks Register button
    Then Registration should fail
    And User should see password mismatch error message
    And User should remain on registration page

negative_case_3.name: Registration fails with invalid SSN format
negative_case_3.description:
Test Case: NEGATIVE - Invalid SSN Format
Steps:
1. Navigate to registration page
2. Fill all fields with valid data EXCEPT SSN:
   - First Name: Bob
   - Last Name: Johnson
   - Address: 789 Pine Road
   - City: Chicago
   - State: IL
   - Zip Code: 60601
   - Phone: 3125551234
   - SSN: ABC-DEF-GHIJ (INVALID - contains letters)
   - Username: bobjohnson2026
   - Password: SecurePass@123
   - Confirm Password: SecurePass@123
3. Click Register button
Expected Result: Registration should fail with SSN validation error
negative_case_3.gherkin:
Feature: ParaBank Registration Validation
  Scenario: Registration fails with invalid SSN format
    Given User navigates to ParaBank registration page
    When User enters all required information with invalid SSN
    And User enters invalid SSN format (letters instead of numbers)
    When User clicks Register button
    Then Registration should fail
    And User should see SSN validation error message
    And User should remain on registration page
